owncloud 9 diff

owncloud 9.0.0 is out. I tested the engine it works perfectly (contacts, sms, weather, calendar, files/sharing and other native apps). Upgrade works perfect too for database (i'm using pgsql 9.5)

You will find the diff and the testport attached below.

Thanks
